differential_diagnoses: Metastatic malignancy with paraneoplastic or infectious complications
next_steps: Perform ultrasound-guided biopsy of the hepatic mass
Obtain CT-guided biopsy of pulmonary nodules
Perform diagnostic vitrectomy or vitreous tap of the right eye for culture and PCR
Request specialized microbiological culture for Burkholderia pseudomallei
Perform transesophageal echocardiography to better evaluate for endocarditis
Obtain expert ophthalmology consultation for surgical management of endophthalmitis
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics and antifungal coverage pending culture results
